svg.title: Leopard AI
svg.desc: Leopard AI wordmark. Uses SF Pro Display → Inter → system-ui stack. Color: accent.gold from brand/tokens.json. Transparent background. Baseline sits on y=82 at 56px cap height; tracking is slightly tight at display size.

text.font-family: SF Pro Display, Inter, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Segoe UI, sans-serif
